title: Fix docker-compose.speech.yml image name
description: docker-compose.speech.yml:5 references `homeassistant-mcp:latest` but CI pushes to `jangoblockchained/homeassistant-mcp`. Also uses `privileged: true` and `network_mode: host` on wake-word container (security risk). Change image name and consider whether privileged/host is actually required.
validation: Read docker-compose.speech.yml, confirm image name matches CI push target.
